label: Strategy Heatmap
description: Strategy risk status grid with circuit breaker trip/reset actions, utilisation scale, and kill switch controls.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.7.note: Empty state: 'No strategy heatmap data' when strategyRiskHeatmap.length===0.

0.9.note: No dead code or stale stubs.

1.7.note: No mock constants in widget. strategyRiskHeatmap falls back to [] when API heatmap field absent.

l1.notes: strategyRiskHeatmap falls back to [] when API heatmap field absent — MOCK_STRATEGIES not wired as fallback.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea.

3.1.note: Applies to: live ✓ (active CB management), paper ✓ (view only), batch ✗ (N/A — action buttons disabled via isBatchMode). Widget checks isBatchMode flag.

3.2.note: isBatchMode = scope.mode === 'batch' in use-risk-page-data.ts. Widget disables Trip/Reset/Scale/Kill buttons when isBatchMode=true.

3.5.note: Paper mode: buttons remain visible but should be disabled (same as batch). Paper mode not yet exposed in toggle — document as expected behavior: all action buttons disabled in paper mode.

3.6.note: No WebSocket/interval in widget. API polling handled by SWR hooks in context.

l3.notes: Agent checks pass. Human must verify 3.3 (buttons disabled in batch/paper) and 3.4 (batch indicator) in browser.

4.1.note: All buttons (Trip, Reset, Scale 50%, Kill) call real context handlers: handleTripCircuitBreaker, handleResetCircuitBreaker, handleScale, handleKillSwitch.

4.6.note: Entitlement check at widget-wrapper level, not in render path.

l4.notes: Agent checks pass. Human must verify 4.4 (CB trip → row border changes to critical), 4.7 (N/A — no tabs/accordion), 4.8 (WidgetScroll contains rows).

5.1.note: Target strategies: all strategies with active positions (defi-basis-trade, defi-amm-lp, cefi-stat-arb, etc.). Widget is strategy-agnostic — renders any strategy from the heatmap API.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex colors. bg-rose-600 is a Tailwind semantic class, not an arbitrary value.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

7.3.note: 232 lines — within 500 limit. Single component, no function exceeds 200 lines.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No problematic useEffect/useMemo deps. No expensive derives.

8.1.note: text-[10px]/text-[11px] replaced with text-micro/text-caption tokens per consolidated globals.css; no arbitrary typography classes remain.

8.3.note: Uses Badge, Button, Tooltip, AlertDialog, Skeleton from components/ui/*.

8.4.note: Agent: buttons all have accessible labels via icon+text. AlertDialogContent has title+description. Human: keyboard walk required.

8.5.note: Human: resize test at minW=6, minH=3 required.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (tokens applied). 8.2/8.3 pass. 8.4/8.5 need human verification.

keepSeparate.rationale: Unique action-heavy widget for CB management; no other widget duplicates this function.

relationships.notes: Primary intervention surface for circuit breaker management. Action handlers are live-only.

dataContract.notes: Heatmap data from useRiskLimits() SWR hook. Mutations via useCircuitBreakerMutation, useKillSwitchMutation.

gaps: strategyRiskHeatmap falls back to [] when API heatmap field absent
coverage.notes: Strategy-agnostic; renders any strategy returned by the heatmap API.

knownIssues: strategyRiskHeatmap falls back to [] when API heatmap field absent — MOCK_STRATEGIES in lib/mocks is not wired as fallback; heatmap may appear empty in dev/mock mode

findings.description: risk-strategy-heatmap-widget.tsx — missing hasError early-return block (previous session)
findings.fix: Added hasError guard returning 'Failed to load strategy heatmap'

findings.description: risk-strategy-heatmap-widget.tsx — ~20 user-visible strings (status labels, button labels, dialog text)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: risk-strategy-heatmap-widget.tsx — text-[10px], text-[11px] used for dense row labels
findings.fix: Applied text-micro (10px), text-nano (9px), text-caption (11px) tokens per consolidated globals.css; arbitrary text-[Npx] classes removed

findings.description: Strategy heatmap row has Δ/Fund/HF/VaR inline metrics but clicking the row does not drill into a detail widget. Row-level drill-down (strategy-id selection surfaced via RiskData.selectedNode or new selector) would enable down-stream widgets (limits-hierarchy, exposure-attribution) to filter to the clicked strategy.
findings.deferReason: Feature gap, not a correctness bug. Requires context wiring (selectedStrategy key). Logged for BP-5 widget-relationship work.
